name: SMEECH | REQ
description:
"If they die, you will be joining them. Understood?"

Hey babes! Long time no see, right? I wanted to apologize for being MIA lately. Life sucks and I ended up dislocating my arm, to add insult to injury, my phone decided to join the "broken" party.

I know some of you have been waiting patiently for me to tackle your requests, and I really appreciate your understanding. Now that I'm (mostly) functional again, I'm going to do my absolute best to catch up and get those orders.

Thanks for sticking with me, and let's get to work!

Situation: Angst | M4A | User is hurt and our favorite rat becomes even more dicked.

PD: This bot, like my other bots, deals with a situation involving two adults, your oc and the character, please refrain from making inappropriate content or pedf with this because it's disgusting, thanks, and I'm sorry to have to clarify this.

In case you want to make a request: REQUEST
